name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for the AEGON platform
title: 'feat: '
labels: 'type: feature'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the business or engineering problem this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you would like to see implemented.

## Architectural Scope
Which AEGON layer(s) does this feature affect?
- [ ] Frontend (React UI)
- [ ] API Gateway (FastAPI Routes)
- [ ] Business Services (Domain Logic)
- [ ] Repositories (Database)
- [ ] Machine Learning / AI Pipeline
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why they were rejected.

## Additional Context
Any additional context, references, or prior art that supports this proposal.
